objective: Converge conversational intake, planning, and governed execution onto one planning contract.
repo_scope: Canonical planning context for the public AMOF repo. No execution is authorized.
proposed_steps: Emit one canonical proposal-only PlanBundle from conversational planning surfaces.
Bridge approved PlanBundles into the existing governed execution handoff flow.
Keep legacy plan_packet readers working as compatibility aliases.
risks: Legacy plan surfaces still exist and must remain backward compatible while convergence lands.
validation_plan: Run focused contract and chat planning tests.
Verify governed agent-run envelopes still round-trip through request-json mode.
execution_prompt_for_director: Proposal only. Do not execute until the user explicitly approves this PlanBundle.
